nasb.text: You covered it with the deep as with a garment; The waters were standing above the mountains.

esv.text: You covered it with the deep as with a garment; the waters stood above the mountains.

cnv.text: 你用深水像衣服一般覆蓋大地， 使眾水高過群山。

ccb.text: 你以深水为衣覆盖大地， 淹没群山。

csbs.text: 你使深渊的水如同衣袍遮盖大地， 众水高过群山。
